positive: A celestial forest canopy forming geometric patterns, featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna. The design should be a high-contrast silhouette composition of interlocking shapes: stylized moon phases, constellations, and abstract mythical creatures (e.g., serene winged beasts, winding vines). The overall style is Neo-Art Nouveau meets cosmic vaporwave, rendered in clean, bold outlines on a solid background. Color palette limited to deep indigo, muted gold, luminous teal, and negative black space. Perfect for centered apparel printing, emphasizing strong negative space and clean edges. Studio lighting, minimalist vector illustration, symmetrical composition, detailed etching style.
